title: ARM-0.7: A Steerable Model with Emergent Capabilities
summary: A steerable robotic foundation model that exhibits a step-change in generalization across manipulation and navigation tasks.
body: ARM-0.7 introduces steerable behavior control in a single policy while preserving open-world transfer across tasks.
The model combines language conditioning, visual grounding, and action regularization so robots can respond to user intent with fewer demonstrations.
Across unseen manipulation benchmarks, ARM-0.7 improves success rate and consistency while maintaining real-time inference.
